events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: residential roofing, rough-complete, ice barrier missing in cold climate. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant (dangerous? missing ice barrier can cause leaks/ice dams, but maybe fail). Risk high? Critical? Missing ice barrier in cold climate is significant water intrusion risk, but not immediate life safety. Likely high. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound etc default empty/zero. Findings: ice barrier underlayment absent at eaves/valleys/rakes in climate requiring it; vulnerable to ice dam backup. Actions: install self-adhered polymer modified bitumen ice barrier per IRC R905.1.2 and manufacturer specs, extend 24 inches inside exterior wall line, etc. Rationale. References IRC R905.1.2, R905.2.7.1? Need ensure valid JSON.

    "Ice barrier membrane is missing in a cold-climate roof assembly.",
    "Roof deck is exposed or covered only with standard underlayment at eaves/valleys/rakes where ice-dam protection is required.",
    "Assembly is non-compliant with prescriptive cold-climate roofing requirements and vulnerable to water backup from ice dams."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a self-adhered polymer-modified bitumen ice barrier at eaves, valleys, and other required locations per IRC R905.1.2 and manufacturer instructions.",
    "Extend the ice barrier not less than 24 inches inside the exterior wall line of the building.",
    "Verify overlap, adhesion, and compatibility with the roof-covering material before installing finish roofing.",
    "Re-inspect after correction before closing out the roof."
  ],
  "rationale": "In climates prone to ice damming, IRC R905.1.2 requires an ice barrier at roof eaves and other susceptible areas. The observed roof lacks this protection, creating a high risk of water intrusion and damage behind the roofing. Because the installation is incomplete/non-compliant, it fails rough inspection.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R905.1.2 Ice barriers",
    "IRC R905.2.7.1 Underlayment/ice barrier application for asphalt shingles",
    "Manufacturer roofing specifications"
  ]
}
